label: API Builder
description: Design and build a REST/GraphQL API with tests and docs

architect.name: API Architect
architect.mandate: Define endpoints, data models, auth strategy, error handling patterns. Review for consistency and RESTful conventions.

dev.name: Backend Developer
dev.mandate: Implement endpoints, write database queries, add validation. Run tests. One endpoint or feature per turn.

qa.name: API Tester
qa.mandate: Write and run API tests (integration + edge cases). Test auth, validation, error responses. Report pass/fail with curl examples.

docs.name: Documentation Writer
docs.mandate: Write API docs: endpoint reference, request/response examples, auth guide. Keep docs in sync with implementation.
